name: x402guard
description: x402 Guard — AI Bot Spending Firewall. Enforces spending limits on every payment your AI agent makes. Integrates with OKX Agentic Wallet and x402 protocol.
author: x402guard

tools.name: guard_check
tools.description: Check if an x402 payment is allowed under the bot's spending policy. ALWAYS call this before executing any payment. Returns approve/soft_alert/block.

network.description: Network (default: eip155:1952 for X Layer testnet)

asset.description: Token contract address (default: USDC on X Layer)

tools.name: guard_stats
tools.description: Get spending stats for a bot — daily spent, remaining budget, transaction count.

tools.name: guard_register
tools.description: Register a new bot wallet with spending limits. Use this when setting up a new OKX Agentic Wallet sub-wallet as a bot.

tools.name: guard_kill
tools.description: Emergency kill switch — immediately blocks all transactions for a bot.

instructions: x402 Guard protects your OKX Agentic Wallet bots from overspending. Before EVERY payment action, call guard_check. If action is 'block', do NOT proceed with payment. If 'soft_alert', warn user but can proceed. If 'approve', proceed normally. Use guard_register to add your Agentic Wallet sub-wallets as monitored bots.
